ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency issuing the ticket */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who issued the ticket */,
  "violator_name" TEXT /* Name of the violator */,
  "violation_street_number" INTEGER /* Street number of the violation location */,
  "violation_street_name" TEXT /* Street name of the violation location */,
  "violation_zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the violation location */,
  "mailing_address_str_number" INTEGER /* Street number of the mailing address */,
  "mailing_address_str_name" TEXT /* Street name of the mailing address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the mailing address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the mailing address */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the mailing address */,
  "non_us_str_code" TEXT /* Non-US state code (if applicable) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the mailing address */,
  "ticket_issued_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was issued */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the hearing (if applicable) */,
  "violation_code" TEXT /* Code of the violation */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "disposition" TEXT /* Disposition of the ticket (e.g., paid, dismissed) */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fine */,
  "admin_fee" REAL /* Amount of the administrative fee */,
  "state_fee" REAL /* Amount of the state fee */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Amount of the late fee */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of any discount applied */,
  "clean_up_cost" REAL /* Cost of any clean-up required */,
  "judgment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the judgment (if applicable) */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of payment made */,
  "balance_due" REAL /* Balance due */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., issued, paid, dismissed, pending) */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the violation location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the violation location */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle involved (if applicable) */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle involved (if applicable) */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle involved (if applicable) */,
  "vehicle_license_plate" TEXT /* License plate of the vehicle involved (if applicable) */,
  "enforcement_area" TEXT /* Enforcement area where the violation occurred */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_inspector_name FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_name") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_agency_name FOREIGN KEY ("agency_name") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_violation_code FOREIGN KEY ("violation_code") REFERENCES violations ("violation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the agency */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the agency was established */,
  "agency_head" TEXT /* Name of the head of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the inspector belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the inspector */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the inspector */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the inspector */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the inspector was hired */,
  "training_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the inspector has completed necessary training */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector's supervisor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspectors_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspectors_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., online, mail-in, in-person) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "payment_source" TEXT /* Source of the payment (e.g., bank, credit card, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "violation_code" TEXT /* Code of the violation */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "violation_category" TEXT /* Category of the violation (e.g., parking, building code, environmental) */,
  "fine_schedule" TEXT /* Reference to the fine schedule for the violation */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Legal reference or statute related to the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id")
)
column_names: Name of the agency issuing the ticket
